package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for duplicate_upstream_calls_same_url_same_handler: Same upstream URL called multiple times in one handler.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule310NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule310NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule310NegativeRecord) (Rule310NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario310Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule310NegativeService, input Rule310NegativeRecord) (Rule310NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule310NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
